title: Lake Pontchartrain Causeway Bridge
description: In building the Lake Pontchartrain Causeway Bridge, assembly-line, mass-production methods were utilized for the first time in the construction of a bridge.
content:
| Data Category | Extraction from Text |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Exact Length (Miles)** | 24-mile span |
| **Exact Length (KM)** | Not stated |
| **Number of Precast Spans** | Not stated |
| **Span Length** | 56 feet (specifically "56 foot decks") |
| **North Endpoint Coordinates** | Not stated |
| **South Endpoint Coordinates** | Not stated |
| **General Location Coordinates** | 30 11 59.2 N, 90 07 21.7 W |

**Construction Dates and Timeline**
* **First piles driven:** May 23, 1955
* **Total construction duration:** Fourteen months
* **Completion date:** 1956
* **Original (southbound) bridge opening date:** August 30, 1956
